text:
0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1 = Unknown
142 P1BAA P1BAA_SPCH_THR_DAY 38baA(P1baA)Speech Language Pathology Audiology - Days CHAR 1 Indicates the number of days of speech language pathology and audiology therapy the patient received in the last seven days.
143 P1BAB P1BAB_SPCH_THR_MIN 38baB(P1baB)Speech Language Pathology Audiology - Minutes CHAR 4 Indicates the total number of minutes of speech language pathology and audiology therapy the patient received during the past seven days.
144 P1BBA
